creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Franco Fichtner from comment #1)

> … ping6 utility instead of ping …

What are their inodes on 13.0-STABLE?

Here, the inode is identical: 

% freebsd-version -k
14.0-CURRENT
% ls -i /sbin/ping
5290690 /sbin/ping
% ls -i /sbin/ping6
5290690 /sbin/ping6
%
